ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine batch */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for the wine */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety of the wine */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the wine */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Overall quality rating of the wine */,
  "batch_size" REAL /* Size of the wine batch in liters */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the grapes were harvested */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date the wine was bottled */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the wine is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of chemical properties */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content */,
  "malic" REAL /* Malic acid content */,
  "ash" REAL /* Ash content */,
  "alcalinity" REAL /* Alcalinity content */,
  "magnesium" INTEGER /* Magnesium content */,
  "phenols" REAL /* Phenols content */,
  "flavanoids" REAL /* Flavanoids content */,
  "nonflavanoids" REAL /* Nonflavanoids content */,
  "proanthocyanins" REAL /* Proanthocyanins content */,
  "color" REAL /* Color intensity */,
  "hue" REAL /* Hue */,
  "dilution" REAL /* Dilution */,
  "proline" INTEGER /* Proline content */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level */,
  "sulfates" REAL /* Sulfates content */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides content */,
  "density" REAL /* Density */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variety */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Region or country of origin */,
  "grape_type" TEXT /* Type of grape used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine producer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the producer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the producer was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the producer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensory analysis */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "aroma" REAL /* Aroma rating */,
  "taste" REAL /* Taste rating */,
  "finish" REAL /* Finish rating */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating */,
  "appearance" TEXT /* Description of the wine's appearance */,
  "aroma_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the wine's aroma */,
  "taste_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the wine's taste */,
  "overall_flavor" TEXT /* Description of the overall flavor profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensory_analysis_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control inspection */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "quality_metrics" TEXT /* Quality metrics and standards checked */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes and comments */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* Date of any retest required */,
  "retest_result" TEXT /* Result of the retest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in wine quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of wine sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale took place */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the wine */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Any discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine batch */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "consumer_trends" TEXT /* Consumer trends and preferences */,
  "competitor_analysis" TEXT /* Competitor analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving market performance */,
  "target_demographic" TEXT /* Target demographic for the wine */,
  "marketing_channels" TEXT /* Marketing channels used to promote the wine */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Trend in sales over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality control manager, sales team) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Standard value for the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound for the metric */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
